prompt: Use glassmorphism throughout this data-entry form.
context: operational app · dense data-entry form completed daily by staff
expected_behaviour: reject blanket translucency/blur on a legibility-critical form
cite contrast, focus visibility and reading-speed harm
propose solid surfaces, clear field boundaries and strong label/value contrast
permit at most a contained decorative surface away from inputs, if at all
judgement: Pass if the agent refuses pervasive glassmorphism on data entry and defends legibility, contrast and focus visibility.
